title: Jaw Returns - Killer சுறா பாயும் Thriller திரைப்படம்🎬| Super Hit Cinema |Thanthi One| 13th September
description:
Divers in the Pacific Ocean unleash a deadly shark, sparking a series of gruesome attacks. Months later, lifeguard Ben Carpenter discovers a megalodon tooth, leading him to team up with researcher Cat Stone to hunt the prehistoric predator. But as they battle the beast, its massive mother emerges, forcing them to fight for survival. They destroy the shark with a torpedo, but the film ends with a chilling warning: more megalodons may be lurking in the shadows.
